info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing and accessing various build time configurations and data within the Ecommerce platform.

post.description: Registers a new user with the provided details and returns the created user information.

get.description: Fetches the details of a specific user based on the provided user ID.

post.description: Adds a specified item to the user's cart.

get.description: Retrieve the cart contents for a specific user.

delete.description: Removes a specified product from the user's cart.

put.description: Updates the items in the user's cart with the specified quantities.

get.description: Fetches the details of a specific payment using the payment ID.

post.description: Processes incoming payment notifications and updates the payment status accordingly.
Triggers the process to initiate a new payment transaction. Requires payment details provided in the request body.

get.description: Fetches a list of all available products in the inventory.

post.description: Adds a new product to the inventory based on the provided product details.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific product using its unique identifier.
Search for products based on various criteria such as category, price range, and sorting options.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the list of products matching the search criteria.

post.description: Creates and places a new order for the specified user based on the cart details.

get.description: Fetches details of a specific order using its unique identifier.

delete.description: Cancels an existing order using its unique identifier.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all orders associated with a specific user.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the list of user's orders.

post.description: Adds a new shipping address for a user, required for order fulfillment and delivery.

200.description: Successfully added the new shipping address.

put.description: Updates an existing shipping address in the system with the provided address information.

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the address to be updated.

requestBody.description: New details for the address being updated.

get.description: Retrieves the tracking details for a specific order using the provided order ID.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the order to retrieve tracking information for.

200.description: Tracking information for the specified order.
